html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.

Eating a dish spiced with Seasoning Salt grants 25% more healing for healing effects.

Duration 4 minutes.”

-

Seasoning Salt is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Salt Crystal rocks at the Portable Grinding Mill.

Seasoning Salt can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station for a 25% boost to their healing effects. Dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt gain the adjective Salty before their names.

Example

Tips

  • Seasoning salt can be used to counteract some of Warly's food benefit penalty. Pierogi can be seasoned with salt to heal 50 ; as he eats more, salted pierogi will heal 45, 40, 32.5, 25, and finally 15 .
  • Seasoning Salt does not affect the secondary healing effects of food like Jellybeans, so use other Seasonings or leave them unseasoned.

Trivia

  • Seasoning Salt was introduced in the Salty Dog update.
  • While it was part of the Return of Them beta branch, Seasoning Salt was called Salt Crystals. It was later renamed to help differentiate it from the resource.

Gallery

  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt.
  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt in inventory.
  • Dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt appear with a plate on the ground.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Seasoning Salt
"A salty addition for a hearty meal."
Object Info
Perk
Increases the Health value of Crock Pot dishes by 25%.
40
Crafting
×3
Amount produced
2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"spice_salt"
“A little sodium's good for the heart.”
–Wilson
“People say I'M salty.”
–Willow
“Smashed big salt rock into many tiny tasty rocks!”
–Wolfgang
“For rubbing into wounds.”
–Wendy
“TINY FLAVOR ROCKS”
–WX-78
“Just a pinch will do.”
–Wickerbottom
“Good fer melting ice, too!”
–Woodie
“My doctor said I shouldn't have too much.”
–Maxwell
“It has the briny taste öf the sea.”
–Wigfrid
“Mmm, salty!”
–Webber
“Salt, at last! I could weep!”
–Warly
“Tasty rocks!”
–Wormwood
“I could really go for some potato chips.”
–Winona
“Careful with that stuff!”
–Wortox
“This sand taste good!”
–Wurt
“It helps makes camp food a bit less bland. [sic]”
–Walter
“I'll just toss a pinch over my shoulder for good luck.”
–Wanda
“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.
Eating a dish spiced with Seasoning Salt grants 25% more healing for healing effects.
Duration 4 minutes.”
-
Seasoning Salt is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Salt Crystal rocks at the Portable Grinding Mill.
Seasoning Salt can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station for a 25% boost to their healing effects. Dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt gain the adjective Salty before their names.
Example[edit | edit source]
Tips[edit | edit source]
Seasoning salt can be used to counteract some of Warly's food benefit penalty. Pierogi can be seasoned with salt to heal 50 ; as he eats more, salted pierogi will heal 45, 40, 32.5, 25, and finally 15 .
Seasoning Salt does not affect the secondary healing effects of food like Jellybeans, so use other Seasonings or leave them unseasoned.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Seasoning Salt was introduced in the Salty Dog update.
While it was part of the Return of Them beta branch, Seasoning Salt was called Salt Crystals. It was later renamed to help differentiate it from the resource.

Dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt appear with a plate on the ground.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Muối Gia Vị là một Vật Phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Chúng chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Warly trong Bộ Lọc Gia Vị bằng cách sử dụng ba viên Đá Tinh Thể Muối tại Máy Nghiền Di Động.

Duration 4 minutes.}} '''Seasoning Salt''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They can only be crafted by [[Warly]] in the [[Seasonings Filter]] using three [[Salt Crystals|Salt Crystal]] rocks at the [[Portable Grinding Mill]]. Seasoning Salt can be added to [[Crock Pot]] dishes in a [[Portable Seasoning Station]] for a 25% boost to their healing effects. Dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt gain the adjective ''Salty'' before their names. =={{Pic32|Icon Science}} Example == {{Recipe |item1 = Meatballs |item2 = Seasoning Salt |tool = Portable Seasoning Station |result = Salty Meatballs |resultlink = Meatballs/DST }} =={{pic32|Prototype}} Tips== * Seasoning salt can be used to counteract some of Warly's food benefit penalty. [[Pierogi]] can be seasoned with salt to heal 50 {{Hp}}; as he eats more, salted pierogi will heal 45, 40, 32.5, 25, and finally 15 {{Hp}}. *Seasoning Salt does not affect the secondary healing effects of food like [[Jellybeans]], so use other Seasonings or leave them unseasoned. =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Seasoning Salt was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Version History|Salty Dog]]'' update. * While it was part of the ''Return of Them'' beta branch, Seasoning Salt was called Salt Crystals. It was later renamed to help differentiate it from the resource. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Seasoning Salt (Overlay) Dropped.png|Overlay for dishes seasoned with Seasoning Salt.
